prompt: A high-quality mirror selfie captures a {argument name="subject" default="young woman with long, wavy reddish-brown hair and a bold burgundy lip"} standing in a sleek, contemporary restroom. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="vibrant cobalt blue short-sleeved mesh t-shirt featuring a large, ornate "LV" monogram logo in a marble-textured white and grey finish"} across the chest, which is layered over a dark base. Her look is paired with dark, form-fitting leggings decorated with a vintage-inspired floral print consisting of muted beige and soft pink roses. The background showcases an {argument name="setting" default="upscale interior with polished black marble walls, a row of minimalist white rectangular vessel sinks, and polished chrome fixtures"}. The scene is illuminated by a mix of warm vertical light strips behind the mirrors and a striking neon blue LED glow tracing the base of the vanity, casting a modern, high-contrast light across the charcoal-tiled floor while she holds a black smartphone to frame the shot.
translatedPrompt: 一张高质量的镜面自拍，捕捉了 {argument name="subject" default="一位留着长波浪红棕色头发、涂着大胆酒红色唇膏的年轻女性"} 站在时尚现代洗手间内的画面。她穿着一件 {argument name="outfit" default="鲜艳的钴蓝色短袖网眼 T 恤，胸前印有大而华丽的白色和灰色大理石纹理 "LV" 字母组合标志"}，内搭深色打底衫。她的造型搭配了一条深色修身紧身裤，上面装饰着复古风格的花卉印花，由柔和的米色和淡粉色玫瑰组成。背景展示了一个 {argument name="setting" default="高档室内空间，配有抛光黑色大理石墙壁、一排极简主义白色长方形台上盆以及抛光铬合金装置"}。场景由镜子后方的暖色垂直灯带和梳妆台底部勾勒出的醒目霓虹蓝 LED 灯光共同照亮，在炭灰色瓷砖地面上投射出充满现代感的高对比度光影，同时她正拿着一部黑色智能手机进行拍摄。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华洗手间镜面自拍：一个关于高质量镜面自拍的提示词，展现了一位身穿设计师 T 恤的女性在现代高档洗手间内的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: minimalist, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
